languages.text: "Я навсегда покончу с тобой и твоими лживыми изречениями". {n}Манипулус благодарно кивает вам и склоняется над консолью удерживающей машины, знаком призывая вас отойти. Через несколько минут потоки шипящей плазмы, вырвавшиеся из сердца установки, оставляют от пленника лишь лужицу пузырящегося шлака.{/n}

"I will put an end to you and your false utterances once and for all." {n}The Manipulus gives you a grateful nod and leans over the console of the restraining machine, signalling for you to step back. A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я навсегда покончу с тобой и твоими лживыми изречениями". {n}Манипулус благодарно кивает вам и склоняется над консолью удерживающей машины, знаком призывая вас отойти. Через несколько минут потоки шипящей плазмы, вырвавшиеся из сердца установки, оставляют от пленника лишь лужицу пузырящегося шлака.{/n}

A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}

A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}

"I will put an end to you and your false utterances once and for all." {n}The Manipulus gives you a grateful nod and leans over the console of the restraining machine, signalling for you to step back. A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}

languages.text: “我将彻底终结你，连同你的虚妄之言。”{n}操纵者朝你感激地点了点头，随即俯身于拘束装置的控制台前，示意你退后。几分钟后，嘶鸣的等离子洪流自机器核心喷涌而出，将囚犯化为一滩翻滚沸腾的金属残渣。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will put an end to you and your false utterances once and for all." {n}The Manipulus gives you a grateful nod and leans over the console of the restraining machine, signalling for you to step back. A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我将彻底终结你，连同你的虚妄之言。”{n}操纵者朝你感激地点了点头，随即俯身于拘束装置的控制台前，示意你退后。几分钟后，嘶鸣的等离子洪流自机器核心喷涌而出，将囚犯化为一滩翻滚沸腾的金属残渣。{/n}

languages.text: «Acabaré contigo y con tus engaños de una vez por todas». {n}El manipulus asiente agradecido, se acerca a la consola de la máquina de contención y te indica que des un paso atrás. Pasados unos minutos, el núcleo de la máquina comienza a liberar ráfagas de plasma crepitante; finalmente, el prisionero queda reducido a un charco de metal fundido.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will put an end to you and your false utterances once and for all." {n}The Manipulus gives you a grateful nod and leans over the console of the restraining machine, signalling for you to step back. A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Acabaré contigo y con tus engaños de una vez por todas». {n}El manipulus asiente agradecido, se acerca a la consola de la máquina de contención y te indica que des un paso atrás. Pasados unos minutos, el núcleo de la máquina comienza a liberar ráfagas de plasma crepitante; finalmente, el prisionero queda reducido a un charco de metal fundido.{/n}

languages.text: « Je vais mettre un terme à votre existence et à vos mensonges, une bonne fois pour toutes ! » {n}Le manipulus vous adresse un hochement de tête reconnaissant, puis se penche sur la console de la machine-prison, vous faisant signe de reculer. Quelques minutes plus tard, des flux de plasma crépitants s'échappent du cœur de l'appareil, ne laissant du détenu qu'une flaque de métal en fusion.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will put an end to you and your false utterances once and for all." {n}The Manipulus gives you a grateful nod and leans over the console of the restraining machine, signalling for you to step back. A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je vais mettre un terme à votre existence et à vos mensonges, une bonne fois pour toutes ! » {n}Le manipulus vous adresse un hochement de tête reconnaissant, puis se penche sur la console de la machine-prison, vous faisant signe de reculer. Quelques minutes plus tard, des flux de plasma crépitants s'échappent du cœur de l'appareil, ne laissant du détenu qu'une flaque de métal en fusion.{/n}

languages.text: "Seni ve sahte sözlerini sonsuza dek ortadan kaldıracağım." {n}Manipülus, minnettar bir şekilde başını sallıyor ve sınırlama makinesinin konsoluna eğilerek geri çekilmeni işaret veriyor. Birkaç dakika sonra makinenin ortasından cızırdayan plazma akımları fışkırıyor ve mahkûmdan geriye, fokurdayan bir metal birikintisinden başka bir şey kalmıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will put an end to you and your false utterances once and for all." {n}The Manipulus gives you a grateful nod and leans over the console of the restraining machine, signalling for you to step back. A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Seni ve sahte sözlerini sonsuza dek ortadan kaldıracağım." {n}Manipülus, minnettar bir şekilde başını sallıyor ve sınırlama makinesinin konsoluna eğilerek geri çekilmeni işaret veriyor. Birkaç dakika sonra makinenin ortasından cızırdayan plazma akımları fışkırıyor ve mahkûmdan geriye, fokurdayan bir metal birikintisinden başka bir şey kalmıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich werde Euch und Euren falschen Behauptungen ein für alle Mal ein Ende machen." {n}Der Manipulus nickt dir dankbar zu, lehnt sich über die Konsole der Rückhaltemaschine und gibt dir ein Zeichen, zurückzutreten. Einige Minuten später bricht glühend heißes Plasma aus dem Herz der Maschine und lässt von dem Gefangenen nur eine Lache aus flüssigem Metall zurück.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will put an end to you and your false utterances once and for all." {n}The Manipulus gives you a grateful nod and leans over the console of the restraining machine, signalling for you to step back. A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}

Einige Minuten später bricht glühend heißes Plasma aus dem Herz der Maschine und lässt von dem Gefangenen nur eine Lache aus flüssigem Metall zurück.{/n}

languages.text: 「お前と偽りの言葉を、この手で一掃する」{n}マニピュラスは感謝の意を込めて首をかしげ、拘束装置の操作盤に顔を近づけ、後退するように指示する。数分後、装置の心臓部から、高温のプラズマが激しく噴き出し、囚人の姿は、金属の塊に溶けていく。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will put an end to you and your false utterances once and for all." {n}The Manipulus gives you a grateful nod and leans over the console of the restraining machine, signalling for you to step back. A few minutes later, streams of sizzling plasma burst forth from the heart of the machine, leaving nothing behind of the prisoner but a puddle of bubbling metal.{/n}
